meta.title: Polyethylene bags with logo in Tashkent — manufacturer | Alpha Plast
meta.description: Manufacturer of polyethylene bags with custom logo printing in Tashkent: t-shirt, LDPE & HDPE, courier, paper and non-woven. Delivery across Uzbekistan — request a quote.

hero.tag: Now accepting orders for new print runs
hero.lead: Own production in Tashkent: polyethylene, paper kraft bags and non-woven (spunbond) bags. Registered trademark, Faxriy Yorliq award from the Tashkent City Khokimiyat.
hero.rating_sub: Yandex Market, UZPOST, EMU, RISUS, Bread Samarkand

products.heading: Polyethylene bags with logo — any format and volume
products.intro: Polyethylene bags (LDPE & HDPE), paper and non-woven — from 1,000 pcs, full turnkey production. Core bag types and dozens of configurations on request.

items.title: T-shirt bag
items.desc: Polyethylene t-shirt (vest) bag with custom logo printing. A universal format for retail.

items.title: Courier bag
items.desc: Courier bag for delivery and shipping services, with logo printing.

items.title: Postal bag
items.desc: Printed postal bag — for shipments and logistics.

items.title: Bags on a roll
items.desc: Printed bags supplied on a roll.

items.title: Loop handle bag
items.desc: Polyethylene bag with soft loop handles and logo printing. A neat look for retail and boutiques.

items.title: Die-cut handle bag
items.desc: Polyethylene bag with a die-cut handle and full-color printing.

benefits.heading: 3 reasons to choose us
benefits.intro: A full production cycle in-house means quality control at every step and predictable lead times.

items.title: Own production
items.desc: Full cycle in-house: extrusion, flexo printing and cutting. No middlemen, no markups.

items.title: Protected brand
items.desc: Registered trademark “Alpha plast” — Guvohnoma No. MGU 56687 from the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

items.title: Quality products
items.desc: Geometry, print and strength control on every batch — recognized with letters of thanks from Uzum Market and Saia.

configurator.heading: Set the parameters in 30 seconds
configurator.intro: Choose a configuration — we'll prepare a personal commercial offer for your volume.
configurator.note: The exact price, including materials, printing and delivery, will be confirmed by a manager during working hours.

process.heading: From request to delivery — 6 steps
process.intro: No bureaucracy and no surprises in the final price: all terms are fixed in the contract.

steps.title: Request
steps.desc: Leave a request on the site, via Telegram or by phone — we'll get in touch.

steps.title: Quote
steps.desc: We prepare a commercial offer with material and printing details.

steps.title: Artwork
steps.desc: We approve the print-ready artwork based on your brand style.

steps.title: Contract
steps.desc: We sign the contract and fix the deadlines and payment terms.

steps.title: Production
steps.desc: Full cycle on our own lines with quality control.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Shipment to your warehouse across Uzbekistan.

cases.heading: Real projects since 2018
cases.intro: Over 950 completed projects: from 1,000 bags for a boutique to million-unit runs for retail chains.

about.heading: Polyethylene bag manufacturer in Tashkent
about.text1: “ALPHA PLAST GROUP FACTORY” LLC is a next-generation polyethylene bag and packaging manufacturer in Tashkent. Since 2018 we have produced over 20 million bags for brands of every scale — from local boutiques to international corporations.
about.text2: Our mission is to make quality branded packaging for businesses of any size. The “Alpha plast” trademark is officially registered with the Ministry of Justice of Uzbekistan, and in 2025 the company was awarded the Faxriy Yorliq by the Tashkent City Khokimiyat.

certs.heading: Certificates & letters of thanks
certs.intro: Registered trademark “Alpha Plast” and letters of thanks from government bodies and partners.

items.title: Guvohnoma No. MGU 56687
items.desc: Trademark registration certificate for “Alpha plast”. Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Uzbekistan, 2024.

items.title: Appendix No. MGU 56687
items.desc: Description of the Nice Classification classes — plastic materials and packaging (class 16).

items.title: Uzum Market
items.desc: Letter of thanks for professionalism and quality production of polyethylene bags, 2025.

items.title: Saia café & bakery
items.desc: Letter of thanks for fruitful cooperation and meeting delivery deadlines, 2025.

certs.cta_title: Want the same quality for your brand?
certs.cta_text: Request a quote — our manager will prepare an offer for your volume.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: If you don't find your question — write to us via Telegram or by phone.

items.a: It depends on the bag type and print complexity. A manager will tell you the exact figure for your project after clarifying the parameters.
The lead time depends on volume, material type and print complexity. After artwork approval, the manager will give the exact shipping date and fix it in the contract.
Flexo printing — for PE bags. Offset — for paper. Silk-screen and thermal printing — for non-woven. Custom technologies on request.

items.q: Do you work with legal entities?
items.a: Yes, we sign a contract, issue invoices and closing documents. Payment terms are discussed individually with each client.

items.q: Do you deliver to the regions?
items.a: Yes, we arrange delivery across Uzbekistan. Delivery terms and cost depend on the region and volume — check with a manager.

items.q: What if we don't have ready artwork?
items.a: No problem. Our specialist will prepare print-ready artwork based on your logo or brand style — the terms are discussed individually.

cta.text: Leave a request — a manager will send a quote with the exact price and lead time for your volume.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.intro: A manager will reply during working hours. On weekends — write via Telegram.
contact.form_sub: We'll prepare a quote with terms for your volume
